examples.exam_en: Today was the worst day of my life.
That was the worst decision he ever made.
She screamed in terror when she saw the snake.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 뱀을 보고 공포에 질려 비명을 질렀다.

examples.exam_en: The city lived in terror during the attacks.
examples.exam_ko: 도시는 공격이 이어지는 동안 공포 속에서 살았다.

examples.exam_en: The city's population has grown rapidly.
What is the population of this country?
I like music, especially classical music.
She studies hard, especially before exams.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 특히 시험 전에 열심히 공부한다.

examples.exam_en: His hands were rough from years of hard work.
examples.exam_ko: 그의 손은 수년간의 힘든 노동으로 거칠었다.

examples.exam_en: The sea was too rough to sail safely.
examples.exam_ko: 바다가 너무 거칠어서 안전하게 항해할 수 없었다.

examples.exam_en: He gave a rough estimate of the cost.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 비용에 대한 대략적인 견적을 제시했다.

examples.exam_en: There is a big difference of opinion between them.
examples.exam_ko: 그들 사이에는 큰 의견 차이가 있다.

examples.exam_en: The difference in their outlook was obvious.
The team played with great spirit in the final game.
She was with us in spirit even though she was far away.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 멀리 있었지만 마음속으로 우리와 함께였다.

examples.exam_en: He positively refused to accept the offer.
She responded positively to the feedback.
She bought roses at the flower shop.
He stopped by the grocery shop on his way home.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 집에 오는 길에 식료품 가게에 들렀다.

examples.exam_en: She woke up crying after a terrible nightmare.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 끔찍한 악몽을 꾸고 울며 깨어났다.

examples.exam_en: The traffic jam turned the commute into a nightmare.
This festival is based on an ancient tradition.
The story was handed down by tradition for generations.
examples.exam_ko: 그 이야기는 여러 세대에 걸쳐 전통으로 전해 내려왔다.

examples.exam_en: In "letter" the accent falls on the first syllable.
She spoke English with a strong French accent.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 강한 프랑스 억양으로 영어를 말했다.

examples.exam_en: You can use plants to accent the living room.
examples.exam_ko: 식물을 이용해 거실을 돋보이게 할 수 있다.

examples.exam_en: Firefighting is a very dangerous occupation.
Please state your name, address, and occupation.
This is a fast-selling item in the store.
Each item on the list must be checked.
The manager shared the agenda before the meeting.
Climate change topped the agenda at the summit.
She left the house without a coat.
He finished the project without any assistance.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 아무런 도움 없이 프로젝트를 완료했다.

examples.exam_en: I have already met him before.
examples.exam_ko: 나는 전에 그를 이미 만난 적이 있다.

examples.exam_en: The matter is already too complicated to fix.
examples.exam_ko: 그 문제는 이미 너무 복잡해서 해결하기 어렵다.

examples.exam_en: I will call you back later this evening.
She became a teacher in later life.
Smoking puts your health at high risk.
He took a risk by investing all his savings.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 모든 저축을 투자하는 위험을 감수했다.

examples.exam_en: She finally has her own apartment.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 마침내 자신만의 아파트를 갖게 되었다.

examples.exam_en: Mind your own business and stop interfering.
examples.exam_ko: 자기 일이나 신경 쓰고 참견하지 마라.
